summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of music theory learning app with advanced scale features. All major functionality working correctly with one minor timing-related issue identified.

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix the Numberâ†’Chord game loading issue when using timed mode - the game works perfectly with untimed mode but gets stuck in loading state with timed settings. This appears to be a timing or initialization issue specific to timed mode.
